items.title: From Clingan to Gobert to Holmgren, Devin Vassell has been blocking shots by 7-footers throughout the playoffs.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
From Clingan to Gobert to Holmgren, Devin Vassell has been blocking shots by 7-footers throughout the playoffs.

But he's never exhibited the kind of emotion he showed after rejecting Holmgren at the rim with 2:32 left.

No surprise, though. He took Game 5's loss hard after a rare sub-part outing.

items.title: [Highlight] Devin Vassell blocks the dunk attempt by Chet Holmgren, pushes him, bumps him, and also has some trash talk (with a replay)

items.title: Devin Vassell’s all-around play is one of the reasons why the #Spurs are two games away from a Finals berth.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Devin Vassell’s all-around play is one of the reasons why the #Spurs are two games away from a Finals berth.

"His impact has been all over the floor in all kinds of areas and off the floor as a leader," Wemby said.

On the forward's “phenomenal” postseason:
